---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the C4ISR system
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. For example:
- "I'm always frustrated when [...]"
- "Currently, users have to [...]"
- "This would improve [...]"

## 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📱 User Story
As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

**Example**: As a military operator, I want to see real-time weather overlays on the map so that I can make informed decisions about air support operations.

## 🎨 Mockups/Designs
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or design concepts here.

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
- **Backend Changes**: What backend modifications might be needed?
- **Frontend Changes**: What frontend components need to be created/modified?
- **Database Changes**: Any new tables, fields, or relationships needed?
- **API Changes**: New endpoints or modifications to existing ones?
- **Integration Points**: How does this feature integrate with existing services?

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **User Impact**: How many users will benefit from this feature?
- **Performance Impact**: Any potential performance implications?
- **Security Impact**: Any security considerations or new permissions needed?
- **Maintenance Impact**: How will this affect system maintenance?

## 🚦 Priority Level
- [ ] **Critical**: Essential for core functionality
- [ ] **High**: Significant user value, high demand
- [ ] **Medium**: Nice to have, moderate user value
- [ ] **Low**: Minor enhancement, low user impact

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature works as described
- [ ] All user scenarios are covered
- [ ] Performance requirements are met
- [ ] Security requirements are satisfied
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Tests are written and pass

## 🔍 Related Features
- Does this feature relate to any existing features?
- Are there similar features in other systems?
- Does this replace or enhance existing functionality?

## 📚 Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🎯 Implementation Suggestions
If you have ideas about how this feature could be implemented, share them here.

## 📸 Examples
If applicable, provide examples of similar features in other applications or systems.

---

**Note**: The more detailed and specific your feature request is, the easier it will be for the development team to understand and implement your request effectively.
